
# Emergentist and Neuroscientific Models

## Chapter Purpose

Discuss neuroscientific explanations of consciousness, neural correlates, predictive processing, and consciousness as an emergent biological phenomenon.

## Suggested Topics

- 
- 
- 

## Suggested Figures or Tables

- 
- 
- 

## Key Questions

- 
- 
- 

## Notes

Add examples, references, equations, diagrams, case studies, or comparative discussions here.
